itinerary.title: Kuala Lumpur Langkawi Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Kuala Lumpur • Petronas Towers • Langkawi Island • SkyBridge • Mangrove Cruises 05 Nights / 06 Days Classic Malaysia Family Expedition SERIAL CODE: MY-003 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-KUL-LGK-FAM-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Malaysia CATEGORY: Best Kuala Lumpur Langkawi Family Tour DURATION: 05 Nights / 06 Days Kuala Lumpur (2N) + Langkawi (3N) IDEAL FOR: Families, Couples, Nature Enthusiasts Year-Round

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the perfect synergy of vibrant city life and tranquil island beauty with our TRAGUIN curated Malaysia expedition. From the iconic towers of Kuala Lumpur to the pristine white sands of Langkawi, this 6-day journey is designed to create unforgettable memories for your family. THE DEFINITIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: MY-003 | Kuala Lumpur Langkawi Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Malaysia package (MY-003 / TRG-KUL-LGK-FAM-2026): Kuala Lumpur • Petronas Towers • Langkawi Island • SkyBridge • Mangrove Cruises with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN KUALA LUMPUR
days.description: Arrive in the heart of Malaysia. Your TRAGUIN private chauffeur will meet you at the airport for a seamless transfer. Spend the evening enjoying the breathtaking landscapes of the city from the observation deck of the iconic Petronas Towers.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: KUALA LUMPUR EXPLORATION
days.description: Explore the cultural pulse of Kuala Lumpur. Visit Batu Caves, a spiritual site of immense scenic beauty, followed by a city tour featuring Merdeka Square and local craft markets.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLY TO LANGKAWI
days.description: Transfer to the airport for your flight to the jewel of Kedah, Langkawi. Upon arrival, check into your premium stay and enjoy a relaxing sunset walk on the beach.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LANGKAWI ISLAND DISCOVERY
days.description: Experience the iconic attractions of Langkawi, including the famous SkyBridge accessible via the SkyCab. Enjoy breathtaking landscapes and immersive experiences exploring the unique geological wonders of this island paradise.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: MANGROVE & MARINE EXPEDITION
days.description: A curated experience exploring Langkawi's mangroves and pristine marine life. Encounter scenic beauty on this guided boat adventure perfect for the whole family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Conclude your Malaysian adventure with last-minute shopping before your flight, taking with you a wealth of unforgettable memories.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

Domestic flights and inter-city transfers as per curated itinerary
